source_name: Code4rena Nudge.xyz Findings and Analysis Report (2025-03) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_title: Missing campaign existence check in NudgePointsCampaigns.handleReallocation
summary: NudgePointsCampaigns.handleReallocation loads a Campaign struct by ID but does not first verify that the campaign exists. A non-existent ID resolves to a default empty struct with zero values, allowing the function to proceed until a silent or confusing failure occurs.
root_cause: missing existence check before operating on campaign storage loaded by ID
why_not_medium_or_high: the described impact is silent failure or unexpected behavior rather than a demonstrated permissionless value extraction or durable DoS against valid campaigns
operational_risk: callers and integrations may see confusing failures, wasted gas, or ambiguous behavior when invalid campaign IDs are used
recommended_mitigation: check that campaign.targetToken is non-zero or maintain an explicit exists flag
revert with a clear CampaignDoesNotExist error before token transfer or accounting logic
when_it_could_escalate: if invalid campaign IDs can alter shared accounting state
if integrations retry or mis-handle silent failures
if default zero values interact with native token or token transfer assumptions
